full_prompt:
Design a potted threaded insert installation in an aluminum-honeycomb sandwich panel that carries a 150 N tensile pull-out plus 80 N transverse shear service load at limit, governed by ECSS-E-HB-32-22A (20 March 2011) closed-form pull-out, shear-out, and combined-load allowables. The panel is fixed; the design variables are insert diameter, insert depth, potting compound volume, and the local face-sheet reinforcement.

Geometry. Sandwich panel local region 300 mm x 300 mm, total thickness 25.4 mm, face-sheet AA 2024-T3 thickness 0.4 mm per face, Al 5056 honeycomb core 3/16-5056-.0007 24.6 mm thick. The insert is a fully potted KSN16 (KN-1016-4) class with nominal body diameter D_i = 16 mm, potting compound outer diameter D_p = 20 mm, insert height h = 12 mm (partial depth - NOT through the full core; this is a blind insert), internal M5 thread. Potting compound is 3M Scotch-Weld EC-2216 or equivalent, assumed shear strength tau_pot = 17 MPa, tensile 20 MPa (ECSS-E-HB-32-22A tabulated values).

Loads. LC1 (pull-out): axial tensile force F_T = 150 N at limit on the insert thread axis, with ECSS metallic ultimate SF of 1.25 applied per ECSS-E-ST-32-10C. LC2 (shear): transverse force F_S = 80 N at limit. LC3 (combined): simultaneous 150 N pull-out + 80 N shear, evaluated against the ECSS-E-HB-32-22A quadratic interaction equation (F_T/F_T_allow)^2 + (F_S/F_S_allow)^2 <= 1.

Allowables per ECSS-E-HB-32-22A closed-form equations (all in newtons).
(a) Pull-out allowable limited by face-sheet punch-through: P_face = 2 * pi * D_p * t_face * tau_face = 2 * pi * 0.020 * 0.0004 * 3e8 (shear allowable of 2024-T3 at ~300 MPa) = 15,080 N. Not limiting.
(b) Pull-out allowable limited by core shear tear-out around potting: P_core = pi * D_p * h * tau_core_W = pi * 0.020 * 0.012 * 1.17e6 = 882 N. Limiting for pull-out.
(c) Shear allowable limited by core crushing + potting bearing: S_core = D_p * h * sigma_core_crush = 0.020 * 0.012 * 2.55e6 = 612 N.
(d) Combined interaction: (F_T/P_core)^2 + (F_S/S_core)^2 <= 1.

Pass/fail criteria. (R1) At limit load x 1.25 ultimate SF, pull-out demand must be <= P_core allowable: 150 * 1.25 = 187.5 N <= 882 N. MS = 882/187.5 - 1 = 3.70. Pass. (R2) Shear demand at ultimate: 80 * 1.25 = 100 N <= 612 N. MS = 5.12. Pass. (R3) Combined quadratic interaction at ultimate: (187.5/882)^2 + (100/612)^2 = 0.0452 + 0.0267 = 0.072 <= 1.0. MS = 1/0.072 - 1 = 12.9. Pass. (R4) The insert thread M5 must transfer the ultimate tensile 187.5 N with MoS >= 0 against stripping; A286 M5 minimum stripping strength ~ 9 kN, pass trivially. (R5) Panel local face-sheet around insert must not exceed Fty_face / 1.25 = 232 MPa under LC3 combined. (R6) Potting compound volume <= 12 cm^3 per insert to minimize mass penalty.

Solver and analysis expectations. Primary verification is ECSS-E-HB-32-22A closed-form hand-calculation of R1-R4. A supporting 3D FEM with solid potting, solid insert body, and shell face-sheets (ANSYS or Abaqus) is recommended for R5 face-sheet stress visualization but is not mandatory to declare pass/fail on R1-R4. Buckling, modal, thermal, fluid, and radiation analyses are NOT required.

Deliverables. STEP AP242 of insert + potting + local panel, insert mass in grams, margins for R1-R6, and if FEM is run, the peak face-sheet stress at LC3.
short_prompt:
Design a potted threaded insert installation in an aluminum-honeycomb sandwich panel carrying a 150 N tensile pull-out plus 80 N transverse shear service load at limit, governed by ECSS-E-HB-32-22A (20 March 2011) closed-form pull-out, shear-out, and combined-load allowables.

Geometry: local sandwich region 300 x 300 mm, total thickness 25.4 mm, face-sheet AA 2024-T3 0.4 mm per face, Al 5056 honeycomb core (3/16-5056-.0007) 24.6 mm. Fully potted blind insert of KSN16 (KN-1016-4) class: nominal body diameter D_i = 16 mm, potting outer diameter D_p = 20 mm, insert height h = 12 mm (partial-depth), internal M5 thread. Potting compound 3M Scotch-Weld EC-2216 or equivalent (shear 17 MPa, tensile 20 MPa per ECSS-E-HB-32-22A tables).

Loads with ECSS-E-ST-32-10C ultimate SF 1.25 applied on limit.
- LC1 pull-out: axial tensile F_T = 150 N on the thread axis.
- LC2 shear: transverse F_S = 80 N.
- LC3 combined: simultaneous 150 N pull-out + 80 N shear, evaluated against the ECSS-E-HB-32-22A quadratic interaction (F_T/F_T_allow)^2 + (F_S/F_S_allow)^2 <= 1.

Closed-form allowables per ECSS-E-HB-32-22A: face-sheet punch-through P_face ~ 15,080 N (not limiting); core shear tear-out P_core = pi * D_p * h * tau_core_W ~ 882 N (limiting); shear S_core = D_p * h * sigma_core_crush ~ 612 N. Insert M5 minimum stripping ~9 kN (A286) trivially passes. Potting compound volume <= 12 cm^3 per insert.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: ECSS-E-HB-32-22A is a closed-form handbook; FEM is optional supporting.

prompt.title: Potted sandwich insert sized by ECSS-E-HB-32-22A allowables
prompt.brief: KSN16 potted insert in 25.4 mm Al-honeycomb sandwich carrying 150 N pull-out + 80 N shear; pull-out / shear-out / combined closed-form pass.

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: P_core = pi * D_p * h * tau_core_W = pi*0.020*0.012*1.17e6; SF 1.25
A286 M5 min strip ~9 kN vs 187.5 N ultimate demand

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: solid potting + shell face + core-equivalent solid

exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Random-vib amplification rolled into quasi-static limit loads.

eval_coverage: margins-of-safety against all four failure modes
